query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3cVh5zkX4ywvzHG.ac4e076b265a --database Ws6J3kt3aUuWjo2DPX89FU --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
name	text
email	varchar
role	varchar
createdAt	timestamp
updatedAt	timestamp
lastSignedIn	timestamp
passwordHash	varchar
active	int
